testsuite.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should hover Large Format Printers and check that correct page was opened
testcase.classname: should hover Large Format Printers and check that correct page was opened

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should check that filter is working correct for Large format and clear filter
testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Large format and clear filter

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should open Learn More page for Large Format Printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for Large Format Printers

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should open LFP page and use pagination
testcase.classname: should open LFP page and use pagination

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should open LFP page and use sorting by price and name
testcase.classname: should open LFP page and use sorting by price and name

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should open Support page from PLP
testcase.classname: should open Support page from PLP
